Describe the sequence of interactions involving the girls and the man in the Santa hat throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 4s, three girls sit at a table holding dollar bills near a board game; at 10s, the girls reappear with a man in a Santa hat joining them; at 12s, the man opens his mouth wide in a close-up shot; finally at 18s, the group is seen at a party with balloons and a piñata.

question: Describe how the visual setting and activities change from the beginning to the end of the clip.
canonical_answer: At 0s, colorful graphics with the text ORIGINALS are displayed on screen; at 4s, the scene shifts to girls holding money at a table with a game; at 18s, the setting changes to a party room with balloons where a girl jumps near a person in a Santa suit.
